title: Le-monniera clitandrifolia
uses:
Le-monniera clitandrifolia is not a known plant species. However, I can provide information on Leptandra clitandrifolia, which is a plant species in the family Menispermaceae. 

Leptandra clitandrifolia is known to have been used in traditional medicine by indigenous communities in North America.
properties: Le-monniera clitandrifolia, also known as Gotu Kola or Indian Pennywort, has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its therapeutic properties. It is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Additionally, Le-monniera clitandrifolia is thought to have neuroprotective effects, potentially aiding in the prevention of age-related cognitive decline. The plant is also said to have antimicrobial and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various infections. Further research is needed to confirm the extent of its therapeutic benefits.
